zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Ann Grey於大約1470年出生在英國斯塔福爾恩維爾時，她的父親Sir Humphrey Grey30歲，母親Anna Fielding27歲。她於1489年與Richard Saint Barbe of Ashington在英國薩默塞特爾頓 康特洛結婚。他們至少是13個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1520年在英國維爾爾霍明頓享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Ann Grey于大约1470年出生在英国斯塔福爾恩維爾时，她的父亲Sir Humphrey Grey30岁，母亲Anna Fielding27岁。她于1489年与Richard Saint Barbe of Ashington在英国薩默塞特爾頓 康特洛结婚。他们至少是13个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1520年在英国維爾爾霍明頓享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Ann Grey was born about 1470, in Enville, Staffordshire, England, her father, Sir Humphrey Grey, was 30 and her mother, Anna Fielding, was 27. She married Richard Saint Barbe of Ashington in 1489, in Chilton Cantelo, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 13 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1520, in Homington, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Ann Grey est née environ 1470, à Enville, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Humphrey Grey, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Anna Fielding, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Saint Barbe of Ashington en 1489, à Chilton Cantelo, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 13 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1520, à Homington, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Ann Grey um 1470 in Enville, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Humphrey Grey 30 und ihre Mutter Anna Fielding 27. Sie hat 1489 in Chilton Cantelo, Somerset, England Richard Saint Barbe of Ashington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 13 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1520 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Homington, Wiltshire, England.

Lei sposato Richard Saint Barbe of Ashington nel 1489, nel Chilton Cantelo, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 13 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Margery Ann Greyが約1470年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアエンヴィルで生まれた時，父Sir Humphrey Greyは30歳，母Anna Fieldingは27歳であった。1489年にイギリスソメルセトチルトン カンテロでRichard Saint Barbe of Ashingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも13人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1520年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアホーミントンで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Ann Grey(이)가 대략 1470년 영국 스태퍼드실르 빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Humphrey Grey(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Fielding(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1489년 영국 서머세트 치턴 캉로에서 Richard Saint Barbe of Ashington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1520년 영국 윌츠히르 홈잉턴에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Ann Grey nasceu aproximadamente 1470, em Enville, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Humphrey Grey, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Anna Fielding, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Saint Barbe of Ashington em 1489, em Chilton Cantelo, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 13 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1520, em Homington, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ro.Ashington Manor, Chilton Cantelo, Somers: Chilton Cantelo, Somerset, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Ann Grey родилась около 1470 г. в местности энвилл, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Humphrey Grey было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Fielding, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Saint Barbe of Ashington в 1489 г. в местности чилтон кантелоу, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 13 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1520 г. в местности хомингтон, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.
